subject: feat(ui): add responsive pagination across all list sections
body:
Create useShowMore hook for consistent "Show more" pagination with
different limits for mobile vs desktop. Apply to 7 locations:

- DetailPane: 10 mobile / 20 desktop (was unbounded — could freeze)
- Timeline commits: 10 mobile / 25 desktop (was 100 — too many)
- Progress epics: 6 mobile / 12 desktop (was unbounded)
- Contributors: 6 mobile / 8 desktop (was hardcoded 8)
- Tags: 8 mobile / all desktop (was unbounded)
- Discover files: 5 mobile / 10 desktop (was hardcoded 10)
- Projects: 6 mobile / 12 desktop (was unbounded)

Each section shows a "Show more" button that loads the next batch.
Limits are calibrated to avoid overwhelming scroll on mobile while
considering co-located sections sharing the same tab.

Tags: ui, mobile, performance, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
